query: List all segment audiences connected to the destination named 'Person: Birthday today', showing audienceId, name, totalProfiles, createdTime, updatedTime, and used in other audience count for each audience. Remove any row limit from the results.

trace.sql:
SELECT
    T1.segmentid AS audienceId,
    T1.name AS name,
    T1.totalmembers AS totalProfiles,
    T1.createdtime AS createdTime,
    T1.updatedtime AS updatedTime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT T3.segmentid) AS used_in_other_audience_count
FROM dim_segment AS T1
JOIN hkg_br_segment_target AS T2 ON T1.segmentid = T2.segmentid
JOIN dim_target AS T4 ON T2.targetid = T4.targetid
LEFT JOIN hkg_br_base_segment_used_by_dependent_segment AS T3 ON T1.segmentid = T3.segmentid
WHERE T4.name = 'Person: Birthday today'
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
warnings: Skipped hkg_br_property_property.parquet: Invalid Input Error: Failed to read Parquet file 'DBSnapshot/hkg_br_property_property.parquet': Need at least one non-root column in the file
